_meta.description: JARVIS knowledgebase. Edit this file to teach JARVIS your preferences, rules, and project context.

preferences.animation_style: Use cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) for bouncy entrances. Never use linear for UI animations.
preferences.glow_technique: Radial-gradient circles ONLY for glow effects. Never use box-shadow for glows — that's not the Freedom OS way.
preferences.color_usage: Primary (#00d4aa) for CTAs, active states, and success. Accent (#7c3aed) for highlights, AI selections, and purple accents only.
preferences.surface_style: Glassmorphism with backdrop-filter: blur(16px). Semi-transparent backgrounds (rgba). Subtle 1px borders.
preferences.hover_behavior: Cards lift with translateY(-2px to -4px). Buttons scale to 1.05. Always use transition for smoothness.
preferences.mobile_approach: Every new component must have a mobile.css counterpart. Check js/system/mobile.js for detection logic before any UI change.
preferences.typography: Inter for all UI text and display. JetBrains Mono for data, code, numbers, and monospace needs.

card_structure.top_border: ::before pseudo-element with 1px gradient line (transparent → primary-glow → transparent)
card_structure.hover: translateY(-2px), border-color change, box-shadow for depth (not glow)

button_style.base: border-radius: var(--radius-md), subtle 1px border, semi-transparent background
button_style.hover: background fills with primary color, text inverts to white, scale(1.05)

progress_bar.base: height: 6-12px, border-radius: var(--radius-full), track is surface-elevated
progress_bar.fill: Gradient or solid primary, with ::after shimmer animation

empty_state.base: Centered layout, breathe animation (translateY oscillation), muted icon
empty_state.cta: Always include a button or link to take action

hero_section.base: Radial-gradient ambient glow + gradientShift animation on background
hero_section.top_accent: 3px gradient line at top (primary → accent → primary)
hero_section.content: Countdown or score display with text-shadow glow (not box-shadow)

never: Never add inline styles via JavaScript (use CSS classes)
Never use setInterval for animations (use requestAnimationFrame or CSS transitions)
Never break module boundaries (kernel = core logic, modules = features, system = utilities)
Never add a new color without adding it to base.css custom properties first
Never use alert() or confirm() — use custom modals
Never forget to add mobile.css rules for new components
always: Always use CSS custom properties for colors, spacing, radius, shadows
Always check js/system/mobile.js and css/mobile.css for responsive behavior
Always use the existing keyframe animations (fadeInUp, gradientShift, shimmer, breathe)
Always add transition properties for interactive elements
Always use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums for numbers that change (counts, timers, money)
Always use text-wrap: balance for headings
Always export functions/classes from modules (ES6 modules)
Always handle errors gracefully with try/catch in async functions

project_context.mission: Build a personal operating system that helps a teen entrepreneur retire their mom through content creation and business automation
project_context.sponsor: Jitter-free energy drink brand — clean energy aesthetic, premium but accessible
project_context.audience: TikTok-native aspiring teen entrepreneurs who want to make money online
project_context.vibe: Operator energy. Mission control dashboard. Wealth building. Disciplined but bold.
key_features: Dashboard with countdown timer to financial goal
Day Log (daily learning journal with streaks)
Creator Studio (content pipeline: ideas → filming → editing → posted)
Finance tracker (P&L per project, runway calculator)
Stage Mode (focus timer with quotes and wins)

dashboard-hero.description: Uses radial-gradient ambient glow + gradientShift animation on background. 3px top border with animated gradient.

operator-score.description: Shimmer animation on progress bars. Score displayed in large mono font with text-shadow glow.

stage-mode.description: Fixed fullscreen, no scroll. Darker background than other views. Large countdown/timer display.

quick-stats.description: 3-column grid on desktop, 1-column on mobile. Glassmorphism cards with icon wraps that gradient-fill on hover.
